Introduction.subtitle: My name is Matheus Tiburcio, a dedicated Front-end developer.

AboutMe.title: About Me
AboutMe.subtitle: Get to know the story behind the developer, the essence of the code.
AboutMe.bio1: I hold a <highlight>Technical Degree in Systems Development</highlight> from <highlight>ETEC Rubens de Faria e Souza</highlight> and I'm currently pursuing a <highlight>Computer Science</highlight> degree at UNIP. My passion for technology led me to work as a <highlight>full stack developer</highlight>, building with <highlight>ReactJS, React Native, Next.js and TypeScript</highlight> on the front-end, and <highlight>Node.js and NestJS</highlight> on the back-end.
AboutMe.bio2: I've had the opportunity to work on <highlight>international freelance projects</highlight> and I'm currently working as a <highlight>Full Stack Developer</highlight> at <mindGroupLink>Mind Group</mindGroupLink>, a software house, on projects covering the whole stack. What drives me is the <highlight>constant evolution of technology</highlight> and the endless possibilities it brings.
AboutMe.bio3: Beyond coding, I enjoy <highlight>cooking, reading manga and books, and going to the gym</highlight>. My father was a <highlight>major influence</highlight> in my journey into this field, and I'm always seeking new challenges and growth.

item1.title: The Beginning
item1.description: Started programming with HTML and CSS, building small pages and discovering the magic of bringing ideas to life on the web.

item2.title: Exploring JavaScript
item2.description: Took my first steps with JavaScript, growing into React and building increasingly dynamic and interactive applications.

item3.title: Advancing with React
item3.description: Deepened my skills by adopting Next.js, API integrations, application deployment, and best practices such as Clean Architecture and solid code patterns.

item4.title: New Horizons
item4.description: Working as a Full Stack Developer at <mindGroupLink>Mind Group</mindGroupLink>, a software house, on projects covering the whole stack — from front-end to back-end with Node.js and NestJS. I've also delivered international freelance projects and continue to strengthen my technical foundations through a Computer Science degree.

Skills.title: Skills
Skills.subtitle: See the skills that bring my projects to life and make me stand out.
Skills.certificatesSubtitle: Also check out some of my certificates...

Projects.title: Projects
Projects.subtitle: Check out the projects where I put my knowledge into practice.
Projects.privateTooltip: This is a closed-source SaaS project

descriptions.notes: Expert Notes is a note-taking app that lets the user create and manage notes simply and efficiently.
descriptions.dailyDiet: DailyDiet tracks meals, monitors diet progress, and provides motivational feedback with an easy-to-use color-coded interface.
descriptions.toDoApp: A to-do list app where users can add, mark as completed, and delete tasks.
descriptions.readFy: This is my capstone project, an app that aims to encourage reading through goals, a book list, reminders, and more!
descriptions.kore: Kore is a personal finance app that centralizes income, expenses, and monthly/yearly summaries in a simple, visual dashboard.

ContactCard.title: Shall we make a difference?
ContactCard.subtitle: Together, let's create interfaces that set trends and shape the future!

Contact.quote: The mind should be as flexible as water, to adapt and overcome.

Footer.tagline: Front-end developer dedicated to building fast, accessible interfaces with careful attention to detail.
